-1: A year of intrigue, deception and low spirits; the birth of children (or grandchildren) brings only a minor descent. Set-ups and court proceedings are possible. There is a risk of imprisonment, so avoid any fraud — neither take nor give bribes.
-10:
An unsuccessful year marked by a decline in your inner and psychological state and the birth of children (or grandchildren). If you do conceive, guard your health carefully.

-4: danger to your health, a year of declining health and conflict situations. Avoid extreme sports and be careful behind the wheel.
